tools.name: projects.workflowsProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.workflowsProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.workflowsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new workflow. If a workflow with the specified name already exists in the specified project and location, the long running operation returns a ALREADY_EXISTS error.

tools.name: projects.workflowsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a workflow with the specified name. This method also cancels and deletes all running executions of the workflow.

tools.name: projects.workflowsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsGet
tools.description: Gets details of a single workflow.

tools.name: projects.workflowsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsList
tools.description: Lists workflows in a given project and location. The default order is not specified.

tools.name: projects.workflowsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing workflow. Running this method has no impact on already running executions of the workflow. A new revision of the workflow might be created as a result of a successful update operation. In that case, the new revision is used in new workflow executions.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
